face.structure: oval with a softly pointed chin, high cheekbones

details: subtle gradient shading from outer to inner iris
slight shimmer at the lower right corner

face.expression: thoughtfully curious with slightly raised eyebrows

skin.undertone: warm with a slight gold hue
skin.texture: smooth with faint, barely visible freckles
skin.rendering_notes: soft luminosity to emphasize youthful skin

hair.style: long, slightly wavy with layered ends
hair.flow: naturally cascading with a gentle leftward part
details: soft shine reflecting light at the tips

character.aura: bright and keen with a hint of mystery

outfit.base: lightweight, tailored jacket over a fitted turtleneck
outfit.design: minimalistic with subtle geometric patterns on the edges
details: fine stitching visible on collars and cuffs
small, unobtrusive designer logo near the hem
outfit.fit: snug yet comfortable, allowing ease of movement

composition.framing: mid-shot focusing on torso and head
composition.pose: standing at a slight angle with one arm loosely crossed
composition.gesture: index finger gently supporting chin in a contemplative manner

background.color_palette: earthy tones with subtle pops of emerald and brass
background.details: rows of neatly arranged books and softly glowing desk lamps
background.rules: create a calm and intellectual ambiance
